hero.title: Cloud & Architecture
hero.subtitle: Elastic, reliable, cloud-powered
hero.description: Build modern cloud-native architecture to drive digital transformation and business innovation.

overview.title: Cloud Architecture Solutions
overview.p1: We deliver end-to-end design and implementation across public, private, and hybrid clouds. On AWS, Azure, Alibaba Cloud, and Tencent Cloud, we leverage cloud-native stacks to build highly available, scalable, and secure applications.
overview.p2: With containers, microservices, and DevOps, we enable rapid deployments and continuous delivery. We provide cloud migration, optimization, and operations to reduce IT costs and increase agility.

arch.title: Architecture Design
arch.intro: Design highly available and scalable cloud architectures.

migration.title: Cloud Migration
migration.intro: Secure, efficient migration of apps and data to the cloud.

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.intro: Comprehensive cloud security and compliance management.

items.title: Cloud-native stack
items.desc: Kubernetes, Docker, and Istio for containerization and microservices to improve maintainability and scalability.

items.title: DevOps practices
items.desc: CI/CD pipelines for automated build, test, and deployment—shorter release cycles and higher productivity.

items.title: Cost optimization
items.desc: Scheduling, autoscaling, and reserved instances to cut cloud spend by 30%–70%.

items.title: Multi-cloud management
items.desc: Unified management for cross-cloud orchestration and data sync to avoid vendor lock-in.

cta.title: Start your cloud journey
cta.sub: Let us help you build a modern cloud architecture.
